ambiguities.detail: S-05 (AC-05) requires seeding an authenticated user with no org membership (selectedOrganisation === null), but createTestUser always performs the full auth→person→member chain and cannot produce a user without a core_member row.

S-06 (AC-06) requires a user with an org but without read:page.home permission so PagePermissionGuard renders AccessDenied. No v1.5 primitive exists to assign a deny-only or permission-stripped RBAC role for a specific page within an organisation.

S-18 (AC-18) requires triggering toast() from a descendant component to verify ToastProvider is mounted, but TM01 §4 and §5 document no UI interaction that definitively calls toast(). The change-password success path is described as 'dialog closes' with no toast. Synthetic CustomEvent dispatch is prohibited.
